CVE-2014-3970.title: The pa_rtp_recv function in modules/rtp/rtp.c in the module-rtp-r ...
CVE-2014-3970.description: The pa_rtp_recv function in modules/rtp/rtp.c in the module-rtp-recv module in PulseAudio 5.0 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and abort) via an empty UDP packet.
